About Us

Who We Are

PT Indofilament Global Plastic is an Indonesian manufacturer dedicated to producing high-quality nylon bristles for the brush and broom industry. We launched full operations in February 2026, equipped with the best and most advanced filament machinery available in Indonesia.

Our team combines deep technical expertise with a commitment to environmentally responsible manufacturing, using high-grade recycled PET materials to deliver bristles that are strong, consistent, and durable.

From day one, we have built trusted partnerships — including with our current client Nagoya — and we are actively seeking to grow our network of brush and broom manufacturers across the region.

🏆 Best filament machinery in Indonesia
Est. February 2026Client: NagoyaEco-friendly PETTechnical support
Our Mission
To produce the highest-quality nylon bristles with consistent performance, competitive pricing, and reliable delivery for brush and broom manufacturers.
Eco-friendly by Design
High-grade recycled PET is at the core of everything we produce — good for your product, and better for the planet.
Company Overview

Built for Quality,
Designed for Scale

PT Indofilament Global Plastic launched in February 2026 with a clear focus: produce the finest nylon bristles in Indonesia. We are proud to operate the best nylon filament machinery in Indonesia, enabling precision and consistency that competes with top global manufacturers.

Operational since Feb 2026Current client: NagoyaUp to 3 tons/dayScalable supply
Material Advantage
We use high-grade recycled PET — an environmentally responsible choice that delivers superior strength, flexibility, and durability in every filament.
Machine & Technology
We operate Indonesia's most advanced nylon filament machinery — ensuring precision and consistency across every production run, competitive with leading global manufacturers.
Reliable Supply
With up to 3 tons per day output and scalable infrastructure, we are ready to meet growing order volumes for both local and export markets.
Our Products

Nylon Bristles Built to Perform

Every bristle we produce is engineered for strength, flexibility, and long service life — available in multiple colors and specifications.

Brush Bristles

Fine, flexible nylon filaments in vibrant colors for cleaning brushes, household use, and industrial applicators.

Broom Bristles

Stiff, resilient nylon filaments for effective sweeping on hard floors, outdoor surfaces, and industrial settings.

Custom Orders

We accommodate specific colors, diameter, length, and stiffness requirements for OEM and private-label clients.

Current Production

Our Ongoing Products

These are our live bristle colors currently in production — actively supplied to our client Nagoya. Each filament is precision-extruded for consistent diameter, vibrant color, and durable flexibility. Our ✦ Gold Series — available in Copper Gold and Bright Gold — is an exclusive specialty finish not achievable by every machine, featuring a lustrous pearl finish that delivers exceptional shine and elegance.

Our Factory

State-of-the-Art Production Facility

Our modern facility houses Indonesia's best nylon filament extrusion machinery alongside a fully stocked raw material warehouse — ensuring uninterrupted, large-scale production every day.

Our dedicated raw material warehouse — fully stocked and ready to ensure uninterrupted, large-scale production every day.

Production hall — machinery & mezzanine storage
Spacious production floor — ready for expansion

Why Choose Us

Five reasons manufacturers trust Indofilament

01

Stable Quality

Rigorous process controls ensure every batch meets the same performance standard, run after run.

02

Competitive Pricing

Local production and efficient processes allow us to offer pricing that competes directly with imports.

03

Reliable Supply

Up to 3 tons per day capacity with scalable infrastructure to meet growing order volumes on schedule.

04

Eco-friendly Materials

High-grade recycled PET means you get durable bristles while supporting more sustainable manufacturing.

05

Best Machine Technology in Indonesia

We operate Indonesia's most advanced nylon filament machinery — delivering precision and quality competitive with top global manufacturers since our launch in February 2026.

Our Client

Trusted by Nagoya

From day one of our operations in February 2026, we have been proud to supply Nagoya — one of Indonesia's leading broom, brush, and mop product brands — with high-quality nylon bristles.

This partnership reflects our commitment to delivering consistent quality, reliable supply, and competitive pricing that trusted brands depend on.

Nagoya Product Range

Our nylon bristles power Nagoya's full range of brooms, brushes, and cleaning products.

Currently supplying
Nagoya — Broom, Brush & Mop Products

Future Vision

Expanding into new filament frontiers

Our expertise in nylon filament production positions us to move into adjacent markets, continuing to innovate and grow.

Badminton Strings

Precision monofilament technology adapted for high-performance racquet strings with consistent tension and feel.

Fishing Lines

Industrial-grade nylon filament engineered for strength, clarity, and resistance across freshwater and marine environments.

Ongoing Innovation

Continuous R&D in filament extrusion and material science to stay ahead of market demands and quality benchmarks.
